files.tests/unit/test_addition.py:
from services.calculator.core.addition import add_many, add_one

def test_add_one_values() -> None:
    assert add_one(9) == 10
    assert add_one(-3) == -2

def test_add_many_values() -> None:
    assert add_many(3, [1, 2, 3]) == 9
    assert add_many(0, [5, -2, -1]) == 2
